CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judment
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order after hearing (as a separate document from any proposed judgment) to the Court for signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Motion For Entry Of Judment
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Leung telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Ms. Leung requested that the matter be heard. Judge Kahn informed Ms. Leung that he is recusing himself. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment is continued on the Court's own motion to December 23, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)

A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Plaintiff Cach, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Cach, Llc'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions granted in the amount of $225 plus $40 filing fee. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Tom Cohen, Not reported.
